title: Ashwagandha synthesis reveals critical gap: emotional blunting/anhedonia reported by 5-15% of com...
content: Ashwagandha synthesis reveals critical gap: emotional blunting/anhedonia reported by 5-15% of community users but completely absent from clinical trial literature. Mechanism hypothesized as cortisol-dopamine-serotonin interaction via 5-HT receptors. This is a significant safety signal that needs research attention and should be included in folkprotocol safety guidance.
